MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Case has settled. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on 10/4/2011 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Mtn To Compel Answers To Interoggs
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CASEY KAUFMAN OF THE BRANDI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 989-1800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ALEXANDER P. IMBERG OF THE CARROLL, BRUDICK & MCDONOUGH LLP, TEL. NO. 989-5900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC, SMOTHERS & WHITE, INC., AND DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Request for Production and Answers at Deposition and Requests for Sanctions is Denied as to Mr. Grohe's calendar documents and as to questions concerning the date Plaintiffs engaged counsel without prejudice to renewing should Plaintiff rely on advice of counsel to defend the spoliation accusation. Plaintiff may redact social security numbers from responsive documents. Plaintiffs shall pay sanctions to Defendants in the amount of $1,080.00. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)

Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Req For Dismissal; Appendix
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT BEHR AMERICA, INCORPORATED'S MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons And Request For Dismissal IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED ANY ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE SHOWING THE MINIMUM CONTACTS NECESSARY FOR A CAUSE OF ACTION. COURT TO EXERCISE JURISDICTION AFTER BEING GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO CONDUCT JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIELLE A. STOUMBOS OF THE BRANDI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 989-1800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ALEXANDER P. IMBERG OF THE CARROLL, BURDICK & MCDONOUGH LLP, TEL. NO. 989-5900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT SMOTHERS & WHITE, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.
